name: Zeotech Limited
analysis: ZEO has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.0800. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
